description.from: Replace OpenSearch vector store with S3 Vectors for the prototype stack and Semantic Reinforcement Memory runtime. Scope: infrastructure migration in-place, runtime client migration, deployment, and real-world report validation. Definition of Done: prototype stack deployed with S3 Vectors, OpenSearch removed for this feature path, and full report sweep passes.
description.to: Replace OpenSearch vector store with S3 Vectors for the prototype stack and Semantic Reinforcement Memory runtime. Scope: infrastructure migration in-place, runtime client migration, deployment, and real-world report validation. Definition of Done: prototype stack deployed with S3 Vectors, OpenSearch removed for this feature path, and real-world report runs confirm end-to-end behavior.
